name: Test
description: Small automation scripts for testing the automation framework.

scripts.name: Label Word Count
scripts.description: Count characters in all non-deleted labels in the current project.

scripts.name: Swap Label Groups
scripts.description: Swap all labels between two selected groups.

scripts.name: Set Selected Label Text Test
scripts.description: Append a stamp to all currently selected labels to test setLabelText operations.

scripts.name: Move Selected Markers Test
scripts.description: Move selected label markers slightly to test setLabelPosition operations.

scripts.name: Delete Selected Labels Test
scripts.description: Delete currently selected labels to test deleteLabel operations.

scripts.name: Realtime Log Test
scripts.description: Emit stdout and stderr lines to test realtime automation logs.
